chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P. No. S- 151 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case For hearing of main case 13-03-2023 Mr. Nadir Shabbir Dayo, Associate of Mr. Muhammad Ali Dayo, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Noor Hassan Malik, Assistant A.G. Mr. Sardar Ali Shah, Additional P.G for the State. ****** Learned APG files statement of SSP, Sukkur (respondent No.2). It appears that after conducting investigation in Crime No.10 of 2018 registered at P.S, C-section, Sukkur, police submitted Challan, where after trial was commenced, which resulted in conviction of three accused persons, namely, Ameer alias Khan Chacha, Gamtal and Manzar alias Sooraj and other accused persons were declared as proclaimed offenders. Against them, perpetual warrants of arrest have already been issued. Learned counsel for the petitioner being satisfied does not press this petition. However, he states that the moment complainant comes to know about the whereabouts of proclaimed offenders, he would inform the same to the police and in such case, the police be directed to make immediate arrest of the proclaimed offenders. Order accordingly. Instant petition stands disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE Ahmad
